description: Square designed graphic in ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed hands against a dark torso. A red diagonal banner in the top-right corner reads 'MIAMI' in white serif caps. The top-left headline is in light cyan bold sans-serif caps: 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line '2/10/2025 | Miami, FL.' The name appears large in white bold sans-serif: 'Dario Gonzalez.' Below is a white 'CRIME:' label with one bulleted entry: 'Lewd/lascivious child abuse.' At bottom left are the DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; at bottom right is a red box reading '-THE- WORST FIRST.'
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Miami, FL; Dario Gonzalez; CRIME: Lewd/lascivious child abuse; MIAMI; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
